name: pika-plugin
description: Evaluate Pika videos with an auditable TRIBE v2, OpenCV, and YOLO ad score, then recursively improve them with reward feedback.

interface.shortDescription: Score and recursively improve Pika videos
interface.longDescription: Percept Video Eval gives Pika an auditable reward layer. It scores clips of at most three seconds with a weighted combination of TRIBE v2 cortical activation, OpenCV production features, and YOLO semantic/composition features, then feeds the weakest weighted features back into a maximum-five-iteration Pika improvement loop.
defaultPrompt: Evaluate this Pika video and show its weighted ad score.
Recursively improve this three-second Pika ad.
Compare these Pika video candidates and keep the winner.
